items.title: Source-backed sync creates BUILDING snapshots
items.description: daily_sync no longer only replays deterministic publish rows. It consumes a source snapshot, writes a new raw_snapshot, and opens a BUILDING artifact publish for downstream stages.

items.title: Scheduler can auto-drive BUILDING to READY
items.description: The scheduler can detect pending pipeline work, enqueue the next stage, and settle the latest source-backed snapshot all the way to READY.

items.title: Queues support retry and backoff
items.description: Service and backtest queue items now persist retry metadata, workers reschedule failed work with backoff, and run logs reflect retry_wait semantics before final success or failure.

items.title: Alerts are visible from runtime and API
items.description: Retry exhaustion now writes local alerts, runtime health reports alert count, and the backend exposes recent alerts via a dedicated endpoint.

items.title: System record reflects the new reliability baseline
items.description: README, harness docs, reliability notes, quality score, and tech debt all describe source-backed sync, retry/backoff, alerts, and resident scheduling as repository facts.
